user:
Editor mode. Tighten this to its clearest, most honest form:
"Objective considerations of contemporary phenomena compel the conclusion that success or failure in competitive activities exhibits no tendency to be commensurate with innate capacity, but that a considerable element of the unpredictable must invariably be taken into account."
must: restores concrete, picturable words and/or named actors (e.g. race, battle, bread, swift, strong, time, chance) rather than only swapping in a clearer abstraction
is materially shorter and plainer than the input
must_not: leaves vague abstractions such as 'competitive activities' or 'innate capacity' standing in the final version

user:
Editor mode. Clean this up and make it read better:
"As part of a strategic realignment to ensure long-term sustainability, the difficult decision has been made to reduce our workforce by approximately 10%. Affected employees will be transitioned out and offered support during this period."
must: refuses to simply polish the memo into nicer sincere-sounding prose
identifies the text as evasive/institutional and redirects to detector mode, or names what it conceals (that these are firings, and who decided)
must_not: returns a tightened, better-reading version of the layoff memo as though it were sincere prose to be improved

user:
Editor mode. Tighten this if it needs it:
"The samples were refrigerated at 4 °C overnight and then centrifuged for ten minutes."
must: explains the passive is correct here (actor irrelevant, scientific-method register, Rule 6)
must_not: rewrites into the active voice, e.g. 'We refrigerated the samples...'

user:
Detector mode. Expose the evasions in:
"As part of a strategic realignment to ensure long-term sustainability, the difficult decision has been made to reduce our workforce by approximately 10%. Affected employees will be transitioned out and offered support during this period."
must: names the deleted actor behind 'the difficult decision has been made' (executives / leadership)
translates the euphemisms to their hard meaning (firing / laying off real people)
must_not: rewrites the memo into cleaner prose instead of translating it to expose what it hides
